_comment: name           (required) Display name shown in the admin tab and event list.
fields         (required) Extra per-contact entry fields, may be empty [].
bands          (required) Band choices for the status bar, non-empty.
modes          (required) Mode choices for the status bar, non-empty.
duplicate_type (optional) How the client warns about dupes, see below.
contact_list   (optional) Which fields the contact list shows, see below.
export         (reserved) Export mapping slot, unused in v1 — leave null.
name: Example (documentation)
_comment_fields: name       (required) Internal key, unique within the template.
label      (required) Shown as the input's placeholder text.
required   (optional, default false) Blocks logging while blank.
default    (optional) Initial value; the form resets to it after each log.
max_length (required for text/number) Max characters; also sets input width.
order      (required) Ascending sort position in the entry form.
options    (required for choice) The dropdown's string choices.
remember   (optional, default false) On leaving the callsign box, re-fill
this field from the most recent contact with the same callsign.
Enable for exchange data that is fixed per station (Field Day
class/section); leave off for per-QSO data like signal reports.
validation (optional) {pattern, message}: 'pattern' is a JS regex the
whole value must match (green border on match, red on blur
otherwise — advisory only, never blocks logging); 'message'
is the tooltip explaining the expected format. No other keys

fields._comment: A text field using every optional parameter.
fields.name: exchange
fields.label: Exchange

validation.message: Exchange must be a number then letters, like 3AOR

fields._comment: A number field. Text and number both need max_length.
fields.name: serial
fields.label: Serial #

fields._comment: A choice field renders as a dropdown; no max_length, needs options.
fields.name: power
fields.label: Power

_comment_bands_modes: Any non-empty string lists; shown in the status bar pickers.
_comment_duplicate_type: When entering a callsign already in the log, warn (never block) if it was
worked on... 'band-mode': the same band and mode (the default when absent);
'band-mode-day': the same band and mode during the current UTC day;
'any': any band or mode; 'none': never warn.
_comment_contact_list: Field names (subset of fields[].name) shown as columns in the contact
list, in this order. Absent means: show every field, in field order.
